note: These are the authoritative numbers from the actual production retrain (02_ml_modeling.ipynb, executed end-to-end), not an isolated re-test script. An earlier attempt to reproduce this comparison via a standalone script gave a different, inconsistent recall figure for the baseline (0.707 vs the notebook's real 0.640) -- likely a reproducibility quirk in exactly reconstructing the original 7-feature baseline outside the notebook pipeline. Rather than paper over that discrepancy, this file uses the values actually printed by the executed notebook, which are also what's reported in README.md, METHODOLOGY.md, and FINDINGS.md.
